meta.title: Arming the AC-130 GUNSHIP with long-range strike missiles!?
meta.description:
The U.S. Air Force wants to equip its AC-130 Gunships with low-cost, long-range cruise missiles to dramatically increase their ability to strike surface targets deep inside contested airspace. 

Let's talk about this concept, and the Leidos Black Arrow cruise missiles being developed for the job. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
